grid_source: raw_json_ตัวที่ใช้งานจริง/04บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_02/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_02_หน้า00_gridline.json
schema_note: Alternate foundation system to S-02 (spread footing). Same grid, same C0 dummy-row confirmation. Footing marks are pile-cap numbers (F2/F5/F9/F12), matching detail sheets S-15 (F2,F5), S-16 (F9), S-17 (F12).
warnings: Same irregular footprint as S-02 -- row A has no footing/column at col1.

MERGED_2026-07-20 per user rule: all 4 pile-cap marks (F2, F9, F12, F5) were each split across 2 entries; each is now ONE entry with summed count and concatenated grid_refs (12 elements -> 8). No grid_ref appeared in more than one entry, so the total (16 pile caps) is unchanged, and each entry's count now equals the length of its grid_refs array. Same merge applied to the sibling spread-footing sheet หน้า31, whose F0.60x0.60/F1.30x1.30/F1.60x1.60/F1.00x1.00 map one-to-one onto this sheet's F2/F9/F12/F5 at identical positions.

CAUTION for anyone applying this rule elsewhere: merging is correct only when the entries' grid_refs do NOT overlap. Where the same grid_ref appears twice for one mark (as found on house #3's หน้า29/หน้า30 at B3) that is a double-count bug and the duplicate must be DELETED, not summed.
